title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama’s REST API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embeddings wrappers.

title: chainlit-ollama-example
summary: One-click starter that spins up a Chainlit chat UI backed by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface (ChatGPT-style) for Ollama models; runs entirely in browser.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models on macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich-terminal chat client with history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI and shortcuts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and compose snippets for Ollama.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module that spins up a GPU-enabled EC2 instance with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that streams Ollama answers into threads with rate-limiting.

title: ollama-mcp-server
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop & friends.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to build and run Ollama declaratively on NixOS with GPU drivers.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop client for Ollama with conversation export and themes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-huggingface-space
summary: Hugging Face Space demo that streams Ollama models in browser via free CPU/GPU.
